top_signals.title: Japan opposition raps Takaichi over imperial law revision
top_signals.summary: Some opposition lawmakers said that her move could undermine previous discussions held by the Diet to form its consensus on the measures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
